title: Glowing Netherite (Ancient Debries)
description: Ancient Debris now has a blue glow with an emissive effect, making it much easier to spot while mining.
body:
# Description
This resource pack changes Ancient Debris blocks to a bright blue color and adds glow (emissive effect) so they are easier to spot among all the red Nether blocks. Even if you’re mining in the dark, these blocks will emit light.

# How to use
1. Make sure your client supports emissive textures(**Explanation in the dependencies section**)
2. Put the pack into your resourcepacks folder.
3. Enable it in-game.

# Dependencies
- [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

  Or
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) Mod

<details>
<summary>Why You need these (click here)</summary>
  
### **Note / Explanation:**
You actually **can** use this resource pack without these mods, but the blocks will no longer glow.
The glowing effect comes from the emissive feature provided by OptiFine or the Continuity mod.

You can see the difference between the two states here:

![Glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c478843990c3e897070d116a757619111f658035_0.webp)
![Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc4bae680ee53299e703b078c2a81aaebcff14c3_0.webp)

</details>

# Extra
### Credit:
- You’re free to use this resource pack anywhere (modpacks, videos, etc.).
- I’d be happy if you mention me and link to me, but it’s not required.

### Contact:
If you want, you can join [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/UfwszAAEne) to get in touch with me.
## **Made with ❤️ • FlamingShadow**
